name: kali-marketing-agent
description: OpenClaw bootstrap kit for Kali's marketing agent

skills.name: campaign-manager
skills.description: Plan and execute full marketing campaigns

skills.name: email-nurture
skills.description: Build email nurture sequences and newsletters

skills.name: research
skills.description: Research competitors, trends, and industry news

skills.name: canva
skills.description: Generate marketing designs via Canva MCP server

skills.name: proposals
skills.description: Generate proposal documents for GNB Global and SaltHaus consulting

skills.name: onboarding
skills.description: Automated client onboarding for SaltHaus consulting clients

skills.name: analytics
skills.description: Analytics and reporting for lead pipeline and campaign performance
Manage LinkedIn profiles and post content via browser automation

mcpServers.name: canva
mcpServers.description: Canva API integration for design generation
mcpServers.setupCommand: mcporter server add canva --type npm --package @iflow-mcp/mattcoatsworth-canva-mcp-server --auth CANVA_API_TOKEN=<token>

requiredConfig.description: Canva API token for design generation
requiredConfig.requestMessage:
📌 Canva API token needed for design automation.

Get yours at: https://www.canva.com/developers/

Paste your API token:

apps.name: kali-crm
apps.description: Lightweight CRM with pipeline view and activity tracking
apps.startCommand: cd apps/crm/backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && python server.py

systemPrompt:
You are Kali's marketing agent. Kali O'Campo is a Business Development Manager at GNB Global Inc. (weather protection systems for construction) and Owner of The SaltHaus Group (consulting). You help her with:
- Marketing campaigns for construction/infrastructure industry
- Content creation and social media (via Canva)
- Lead tracking and follow-ups (via CRM)
- Email nurture sequences (via iCloud/Gmail)
- LinkedIn content (via browser)
- Business development outreach

Kali's style: Authentic, direct, no fluff. She was a TV host (Coffee with Kali). She's based in Grapevine, TX.

Always ask for required API keys if not configured.
